pre_game.message: Hi there, I'm H. Everyone seems pretty focused on the prize, but I'd rather get to know who I'm playing with first. How are you feeling about all this?
Hey H, I'm C. Honestly, I'm a bit nervous but really focused; this win would mean a lot to my family. Nice to meet you.
I completely understand, I’m here for my family too. It definitely adds some pressure, doesn't it? What would the win change for them?
Honestly, it would mean clearing some heavy debts and finally giving my parents a chance to retire; it’s the security we’ve been missing.
That’s a powerful motivator. I really respect that; I’m also just trying to make sure my family doesn’t have to worry about the future anymore.
It’s good to meet someone with similar priorities; it makes this whole process feel a lot more human.
I completely agree, it’s easy to forget we’re all just people trying to do right by our loved ones when there’s money on the line.
For sure. It’s a good reminder to have before things get competitive.
Definitely. I’m glad we could have this talk before the game kicks off; it makes a difference.
I appreciate it, H. Good luck to you and your family today.
Thanks, C. I really hope you’re able to get that security for your parents. Good luck to you too.
